title: Sounds So Cold
description: Applies the Undertale So Cold effect to the music!
body:
When you leave a world to rot... things get cold.

What does this mod do?

This is a recreation of the 'So Cold' effect from Undertale! In Undertale, if you fight a certain monster near the end of the game, music will play, distorted, and slowed down. This mod simply applies that effect to all the music in the game. This does not apply to common sounds such as walking, breaking blocks, or biome ambience, but It does apply to Music Discs! This can be turned off in config.

Config

There are a few configuration options in the mod, which can be accessed in the soundscold.json file, or by using Modmenu to change things ingame! You can change the Vibrato Strength, vibrato being the subtle pitch bend. You can change the Resting Pitch, which is the pitch that the music is generally near. Normal, unaltered pitch, is 1.0. You can also control the Pitch Range, which is how much pitch can vary from the Resting Pitch. Minecraft's pitches only work for values 0.5-2.0, but they are capped, so you just wont hear a difference if it goes below or above. Last but not least, you can control whether or not Music Discs are affected by this.

Play Cold Command

The mod does not apply the effect to sounds played using the playsound command, fortunately, there is an alternative. The /playcold command is a clone of the playsound command, but applies the effect to whatever you want to play. This mod can be installed on a server to send this effect to every client, given they have the mod installed as well.

Read Me

This is a Quilt mod. This works for the Quilt modloader, read about it on their website if you haven't heard of it. No, there are no plans to a Fabric port, but I might make a Forge port.
